entry.title: ONB 1.0 Reminder Notification Recipients
entry.content: One of our recruiters has raised an issue that she is receiving Reminder emails for onboarding activities (original notification sent to Hiring Manager). I am thinking this was a request at implementation for the recruiters to gently remind Hiring Managers of their tasks. I cannot find where this is configured. I have checked recipients for the notification email, and the only option selected there is notification type = Hiring Manager Notification. Can someone please guide me to other places I can look for this configuration?

entry.title: Re: How do setup IAS login page for Onboardee and SSO pag...
entry.content:
Hi @dyaryura @Soma5 

Thank you for the solution. I was able to partially achieve the requirement. However, I’ve noticed two issues related to this.

Configuration added

1) Added below code in Target system.

  {

                "targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User']['targetUrl']",

                "constant": https://xxxxxxx.accounts.cloud.sap/saml2/idp/sso?sp=https://www.successfactors.com/xxxxxx&idp=https://xxxxx.accounts.ondemand.com",

                "scope": "createEntity"

            },

There is two issue i have noticed.

  • I’ve added the code you provided, but the account activation email is still displaying the Home page URL instead of the non-SSO URL configured in the code above.
  • When the onboardee clicks the account activation link, they are not prompted to set a password. Instead, they are redirected directly to the SuccessFactors home page, which prevents them from logging into the system later.

ONB-Account activation email template code

<h1 style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;font-weight: bold;font-size: 20px;color: #555;margin-bottom: 24px">Dear ${user.firstName?html} ${user.lastName?html},</h1>

<p style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;font-size: 14px;line-height: 18px">An account has been created for you. To activate your account for <#if user.target_url??><a href="${user.target_url}">${user.sp_name}</a><#else>${user.sp_name}</#if>, click the link below. You will be taken to a page where you will also set a password for your account.</p>

Do you think any changes are required in the email template or in the code?

entry.title: Re: What is a semantic tag? in detail
entry.content:
Dear user,

I’ll try to rephrase what’s it’s been written in the SAP Help documentation and bring some extra explanations which, I hope, will be clearer for you.

 

Semantic tags are basically a way to tell SAP what each part of your Financial Statement Version (FSV) actually means in business terms. You’re saying:
“This section is revenue,” or “That account is for fixed assets,” regardless of your local account structure or naming.

They're especially useful when you're working with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) or Group Reporting because those tools need a consistent way to understand financial data and they rely on these tags to do that.

They don’t change your data. They don’t trigger postings.
All they do is label accounts or FSV nodes with standard business meanings so SAP knows how to treat them behind the scenes.

For example:

- You assign FPA1_REVENUE to your sales accounts.

- You assign FPA1_COGS to your cost of sales accounts.

- When SAC or Group Reporting pulls data, they know which accounts to use in the income statement.

Without semantic tags, SAP wouldn’t know that your account 400000 means “Revenue” — and your data wouldn’t show up correctly in planning models, reports, or consolidation views.

 

I hope those elements will help you understand more about semantic tags.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hi @AlexanderRother ,

Thanks for this. Could you please share some updates on the Transform strategy planned for 2025 stated below by you.

Transform: The transformation of customer and partner code from the classic ERP towards SAP S/4HANA and further towards a clean core is one of the major challenges for many of our customers. We will assist with generative AI in this endeavor starting later in 2025.

Is there any roadmap available for us to check on what will be available as part of this ?

Thanks.

entry.title: the APIs for the Production Order component
entry.content:
Hi ,

the Business Scenario: 

The Production Order item is A . The component of Production Order  is  B and C.

I want to add a product D to the component of Production Order . And I want to add a by-product E to the component of Production Order .

But I find that there is no creat APIs for Production Order Component . It just have Read & Update & Delete for Production Order Component .

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/6d8ed32613654bd488e6d31a6ad3a96e.html?locale=en-US&q=create+Production+Order+Item

entry.title: Re: Getting Payload in CAP NodeJS REST Service Action

entry.title: Re: SAP Comunity Meetup in Recife 2025
entry.content:
E assim foi o nosso segundo SAP Meetup. Foi logo após o evento principal que reuniu a comunidade SAP de Recife, tivemos a oportunidade de prolongar a festa, fortalecer conexões e celebrar o crescimento desse grupo tão engajado.
A melhor parte? Pessoas de diferentes regiões do país estiveram presentes, tornando este encontro ainda mais especial. O entusiasmo e a troca de experiências mostraram o quanto a comunidade SAP na nossa região está crescendo e se fortalecendo ano após ano.
Cada edição desse evento supera expectativas, e desta vez não foi diferente. Sem dúvidas foi excelete.

A todos que participaram e contribuíram para esse momento incrível: muito obrigado! Seguimos juntos, evoluindo e construindo uma comunidade cada vez mais conectada e inovadora.
Nos vemos no próximo encontro!

If you have the result of a query displayed somewhere else, where HTML is accepted (like Crystal Reports), I think you might be able to use line break tags to achieve that (<br>).

BR,
Felipe

Do candidate need to fill in information again (just like the account create page) & accept DPCS? or after login, candidate account will be automatically created?

Thank you in advance!
Samantha

entry.title: Re: Cumulative, Opening balance calculation SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

To set cumulative key figures at the reporting level in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, follow these simple steps:

1. What Are Cumulative Key Figures?

 

Cumulative key figures show values that add up over time. For example, instead of showing just the sales for each month, a cumulative key figure would show the total sales up to that month.

 

2. Define the Cumulative Key Figure in Your Report

 

  • In your reporting tool (like SAP Analytics Cloud or S/4HANA Cloud), find the key figure you want to make cumulative.
  • Set it to Cumulative so that it keeps adding values together instead of just showing them for individual periods (like months or years).

 

 

3. Make Sure Time Is Set Up Correctly

Cumulative key figures depend on time, so make sure you have a time dimension (like months or quarters) in your report. This helps the system know when to add the numbers together.

 

 

4. Create the Calculation for Running Totals

  • You might need to use a function like CUMULATE() in your tool (like SAC) to calculate the running totals automatically.
  • This makes sure that the numbers continue to add up as time goes on.

 

 

5. Check Your Report

After setting the key figures as cumulative, review your report. Make sure the numbers are adding up over time as expected, and adjust the time period if needed.

In short: Set your key figure to cumulative, ensure you’re using a time dimension, and make sure the calculation keeps adding the values over time.

 

I hope those elements will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

#GenAI was used to help generate this content

entry.title: Re: Unable to Subscribe to the Multi-tenant application in BTP Dashboard due to Dependency Error
entry.content:
Hi gregorw,

I have created a Multi tenant SAAS application (Non-CAP NodeJS based) and have deployed this app to SAP BTP in the Provider subaccount. Along with the application I have the saas-registry instance and xsuaa instance created in my Provider subaccount. I am also able to subscribe to this application from the Consumer subaccount.


Current Status: So far, I have successfully implemented application subscription from tenant subaccounts using the saas-registry and an xsuaa instance. I’ve also implemented the necessary logic for subscribe and unsubscribe events in the backend.

Note: This is a pure backend application, and I am not using an Approuter, as there is no frontend component involved. The application is intended to be consumed by tenant-specific backend or frontend apps via API calls.

Problems:

  1. When I subscribe app in consumer subaccount, the xsuaa instance (using tenant-mode as "shared in provider subaccount) is not automatically created in consumer subaccount.
  2. To address this, I added event for getting dependencies while subscribing in backend the code is shown in below picture.

     

  3. Also added "url" for "getDependencies" in "appUrls" and dependencies detail in SaaS configuration file as shown below.

     

  4. After these changes, I tried subscribing to the app again from the consumer subaccount got an error shown below.

     

Asking for Suggestions:

  1. How can I achieve the automatic creation of an XSUAA instance in the consumer subaccount when subscribing to the app, to ensure full isolation between consumer subaccounts?
  2. If not then how can I achieve independent OAuth 2.0 Authentication for tenants specific to their subaccount?

However, if the scenario is to enter the same GL account for all AUC settlement cases then can we default the GL account (For each Asset class may be) in distribution rule so that user dont need to enter the GL account for each Asset.?

Thank you

Sumant

entry.title: Re: Why does Cloud ALM not have the Central Finance Activ...
entry.content:
Hi, jeromerister,
I am going through unanswered posts and I hope you found your solution prior to now but in case not or in case others have similar question, I wanted to reply.

In the SAP for Me Process Navigator, I can see Central Finance maps to 3W1 and 1W4 for S/4HANA Public Cloud:

In checking Cloud ALM's Manage Scopes > Create and in Solution Scenario, I scroll down to SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and activate it:

Fill the title/description and save.

Then, I am able to search for 3W1 and find it there:

Can also search/find 1W4:

I hope this is helpful to you.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Texts of Hierarchical Nodes not shown in Sap Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Expert.

I have created an Analytical Model, where some fields of it have Hierarchies with Directories. Through Associations and Semantics, I have linked texts (Descriptions) and Hierarchies to these fields. Nevertheless, when I try to visualize data, I find an issue: hierarchies are available and correctly selectable (as expected), texts of leaf nodes of these hierarchies are available (as expected), but, for some reason which I totally ignore, texts of the non leaf nodes are not available. I need to understand why these texts are not resolved as expected.

I hope to have been able to explain correctly the context

Thanks in advance for your help

Regards

Maffio

entry.title: Re: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content: Ah I see. For this particular example, I don't think there is a process that syncs this information. Job Information stores a reference (object ID) to the employee's job classification, but any field changes in the Job Classification object will not have an impact on Job Info.

entry.title: Re: Multi Level Advanced Intercompany Sales information S...
entry.content:
Hi,

the Advanced Intercompany Sales process in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public edition is covered with scope item 5D2. Please check the description of the process in process navigator in SAP For Me.

Regards,

Doreen

entry.title: Re: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content: Sorry, my response posted too soon. If you have an onSave rule in Job Info that sets the pay grade field (i.e. Set Job Information.Pay Grade.Value to be equal to Job Information.Job Classification.Pay Grade") then this will happen when you save changes to an employee's Job Information, but not when you save the Job Classification object. Can you reach out to whoever configured your instance and set up the Job Information data model and the business rules?

entry.title: Re: Material-dependent delivery confirmation
entry.content:
I am assuming Frozen food products have a dedicated Shipping Point. 

In that case, for delivering only on Mondays, Wednesdays and Fridays, you can assign Calendar to Frozen Foods Shipping which has only Mondays, Wednesdays and Fridays as working days. 

For the cut-oof time for the Order (12 noon), I need to check. I am not sure of standard solution, may be a small code in one of the Sales Order User Exit may be needed. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Empty parameters after saving JSON for binding creati...
entry.content:
Hello Uwe,

SAP is very heterogenous. Cloud ALM seems to have a very very basic handling of service instance parameters.

A better example for this step (thanks @gregorw) can be found in the "SAP Process Integration Runtime". You can select parameters from a value help and you can easily change them later on. Wonderful!

Here a short walk through - it would be really nice if also the Cloud ALM team would follow this golden standard 🙂

entry.title: "E-Mail Notifications" for bank advanced bank account review
entry.content:
How to Set-up email notification for bank account review process.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: "E-Mail Notifications" for bank advanced bank account...
entry.content:
Choose the workflow scenario Bank Account Review in the App Manage Workflow for Bank Accounts to create Deadline for Sending Email Notification.

Refer the screenshot on the SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3605941

entry.title: SAP CPQ Promotions issue with quantity break limits and applicable discount
entry.content:
I have a promotion on an item with quantity breaks. It is common practice and my understanding that the beginning limit is inclusive and the ending limit is exclusive. However, it doesn't seem to be the case in my test.

 

The two quantity breaks are 0-10 QTY with 0% discount and, 10-20 QTY with 30% discount. When I add the promotion with QTY 10, the 30% discount is not applied, but it should as it is in the bracket. Adding the promotion with 11 items works as expected.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ Promotions issue with quantity break limits a...
entry.content:
Since you have applied the quantity break for 0-10 QTY with 0% discount, it means that for quantities less than or equal to 10, 0% discount will be applied.

And for quantities from 11-20, 30% discount will be applied.

 

Please look at the Scale Example in this help page: Promotions | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Multiple partners partners assigned to single condition contract in ReFX
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an internal staff contract that includes multiple business partners (employees) assigned to it. We have maintained the posting parameters for each partner assignment. We are currently assigning the business partner. but in the condition tab tab is there an option to assign all business partners under a single condition type rather than multiple conditions for the same cost?

Best Regards,

Sridhar

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2504
entry.content:
With the latest release (2504) for SAP Central Business Configuration, an exciting new feature is available. This blog post will provide you with an overview.

Optimized Workflow for Rebase

In the fast-paced world of business process management, clarity is key. If you're utilizing the parallel line in your operations, there's a new feature designed to streamline your workflow. The Configure Your Business Processes app now includes an Exempted from Rebase filter. This provides an easy way for identifying configuration activities that are exempt from the rebase operation and require manual rework.

Exempted from Rebase filter in the Configure Your Business Processes app

For a quick summary, check out this video about What's New in 2504. Don’t forget to also use the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal, which provides further details and links about all the recent changes.

That wraps up the new features this time. Did you like this blog? If so, please leave us a thumbs up at the top. Also, make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have any ideas on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the SAP Customer Influence platform to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

entry.title: Trying to find a field from B1 Journal Entry in a table of HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone. I am writing this to ask for some help finding a field in HANA that I can see in B1 when creating a journal entry.

 

I have activated "see system information" option, and when I try to see what that "Origen" field says, it says:
Origen -> [Form=392 Item=20 Pane=0]
Origen (box where you have data) -> [Form=392 Item=24 Pane=0 Variable=66]

I've tried to search for it in either OJDT or JDT1 but haven't found it. Anyone can tell me in which table can I find that data?

regards,

Yokesh

entry.title: Any option to auto Approve/Reject a PO in My Inbox in sap Public cloud based on a custom field value
entry.content:
We have created a Purchase Order (PO) approval workflow using SAP Build Process Automation (SBPA) to handle all validations and approvals. However, in the final step, we encountered a limitation: the API does not allow us to directly change the PO status to “Approved” or “Rejected” as confirmed in the post : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/whether-the-purchase-order-can-be-approved-through-the-api/qaq-p/12341295

To work around this, we are using the Flexible Workflow in S/4HANA Public Cloud. The PO remains in “In Approval” status until the SBPA process is complete. Once all approvals in SBPA are done, we send a PATCH call to update a custom field in the PO.

In the Flexible Workflow, we’ve implemented a BADI : SWF_CHECK_ACTION_ALLOWED that checks the value of this custom field when the user click on any action from My Inbox. If the field shows that the SBPA process is complete, we allow the user to approve the PO in S/4HANA.

Now, we want to further improve this by automating the approval in S/4HANA without requiring manual user action.

Our question:
Is there a way to automatically approve the PO in the Flexible Workflow/ My Inbox once the custom field is updated from SBPA?

or

Can we use any BADI or other method/Jobs to approve the PO in My Inbox in S4 public cloud, without requiring a user to log in and manually approve it in S/4HANA? or is there a possibility to use a certain CDS with behavior definition exposed as an API allowing to change the status of the PO which is read only currently in the API: https://api.sap.com/api/CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001/overview.

Thank you in Advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: How to remove the left/right margin?
entry.content: Thank you so much!

entry.title: Re: how to maintain PS master record for commitment item ?
entry.content: For Projects assigned PRs and POs automatically create commitments.  You can also manually create commitments via funds management FMZ1.

KantriceD

entry.title: SAP BI Launchpad Load Balancer URL not working in Microsoft Edge browser after upgrading BI to 4.3
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We Upgraded our BI servers from version 4.2 to 4.3. After the upgrade, the load balancer URL for BI Launchpad giving the error 'Microsoft Internet Explorer 11 and other legacy browsers are no longer supported. For more information, see Internet Explorer 11 will no longer be supported by various SAP UI technologies in newer releases'. The strange thing is that the CMC URL works and the individual url for both the servers works with SSO for the BI Launchpad. The Edge browser we have is Microsoft Edge for Browser Version 134.0.3124.93.
 
Does anyone know on why this happens or how to resolve this?
 
Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: Re: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/securi...
entry.content: Hi syedijlalayub, can you shared your solution, please?

entry.title: Problem with authorization objects in G/L account balances
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to run S_ALR_87009815, but I always get error Message No. KM142.

When I look at the authorization check, it says K_PCA needs a * permission. The report should work, because the permission for the G/L accounts, Company codes, ... are assigned correctly and work for other transactions.

Is there a workaround for this problem? Or a BAPI that can be used?

entry.title: SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: SAP and Databricks open a bold new era of data and AI - BDC2767
entry.content:
At this year’s SAP Sapphire, I’m excited to share groundbreaking innovations that are changing the way organizations leverage data. Join me to explore how SAP and Databricks are coming together to transform enterprise data strategies and accelerate the path to AI.

📅Session Details:

Title:
Unleashing the Value of Business Data with SAP Business Data Cloud and Databricks

When:

  • Tuesday, May 20 – 2:00 PM to 2:20 PM
  • Wednesday, May 21 – 1:30 PM to 1:50 PM

Where:
SAP Sapphire – Session Link

What You’ll Learn:

SAP and Databricks announced a landmark partnership back in February that will redefine how applications and data platforms work together. From curated SAP data products to zero-copy integration, this session will show how SAP Databricks within the SAP Business Data Cloud solution empowers data professionals to:

  • Accelerate the development and deployment of AI models and data applications
  • Unlock trusted, business-context-rich data without duplication
  • Seamlessly connect SAP data to the Databricks Lakehouse Platform
  • Deliver real-time, intelligent insights that drive value across the enterprise

Whether you're responsible for data strategy, analytics, or innovation, this session will equip you with actionable insights to elevate your organization’s data capabilities.

Co-Speaker: I am excited to be joined by former colleague and longtime friend Brian Suk, a Senior Solutions Architect at Databricks.

About Me: Kara Reed
I’m a Senior Director of Product Marketing at SAP, where I focus on helping organizations adopt and maximize the value of SAP Business Data Cloud and other cloud-based data solutions. Over the past 14 years at SAP, I’ve held a variety of roles in the Data & Analytics organization, most recently on the Retail Solution Management team. I work closely with customers and industry leaders to guide our go-to-market strategies and support the data transformation journey.

The fun doesn't stop there! Check out these other sessions to learn more about this game changing partnership and the value SAP Databricks within SAP Business Data Cloud brings!

An architect’s guide: SAP Business Data Cloud and SAP Databricks solutions - BDC2633

  • Tuesday, May 20 1:00-1:30

SAP Databricks: Simplify analytics and AI for your SAP software data - PAR1122 – customer success story

  • Tuesday, May 20 1:30-1:50

How Baker Hughes modernizes its applications with SAP Business Data Cloud - BDC3260 – customer success story

  • Tuesday, May 20 2:30-2:50

Unlock the potential of AI with the SAP Databricks solution - PAR1123 – customer success story

  • Wednesday, May 21 11:00-11:20

Can't make it to SAP Sapphire? No problem! Follow along the tags and topic pages below to stay up to date on the latest SAP data and analytics news!

Tags: Data and Analytics SAP Datasphere SAP Business Data Cloud

Topic pages:  Data and Analytics  SAP Business Data Cloud  SAP Datasphere

Now I would like to hear from you:

  • Which use cases in your business could be accelerated or simplified by leveraging the zero-copy approach of SAP Databricks?

entry.title: Re: BTP fiori and odata v1
entry.content: The answer is that when calling to the BYD analytics service to get report data you need to make sure to disable batch calls.

entry.title: Combining Freight order according to carrier for Printout
entry.content:
Hi,

We are doing greenfield implementation of S4 HANA 2023. We do not have advance TM but basic embedded TM.

The requirement is to print a note to carrier which contains all freight orders on the day with different ship to party. They do it for each carrier. So, a single printout containing all freight orders with same carrier but different ship to. The print contains basic details of all freight orders like number, ship to, quantity etc

I checked but could not find any standard way to do that. Read about the consignment order but it is I believe in advance TM. Is there a standard way to achieve this.

If not, I was thinking about custom methods. Freight order lists are there in Freight order worklist app, pick according to the carrier and collate it in a custom pdf created for the purpose. 

 Is there any other app which allows you to take collective print of FO.

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Christof,

Thanks for sharing the information. What is basic difference between DPG and BW connection (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/e589041e80264f43b6c209c407336376.html?locale=en-US)  in Datasphere with respect to BW 7.5 as a source to BDC? In terms of supportibility both support same BW objects. Is the difference only that  DPG sends data to Object storage?

 

Regards,

Viren

entry.title: Re: Supplier or Customer Master Data Upload using Migration Cockpit

entry.title: Re: Include Header row in subsequent pages is not working for adobe header repetition issue
entry.content: Can you please share also an "Hierarchy" (tree on the left) - mainly the top part?

entry.title: Re: Bereitstellung der Formulare für die Deutsche Umsatzsteuer-Voranmeldung/Jahresmeldung 2021 in SA
entry.content:
Hallo, ich kann auflösen 🙂 wir hatten den Hinweis manuell heruntergeladen und aus FOTV Stylesheet importiert. (SNOTE war zu diesem Zeitpunkt nicht funktionstüchtig.) Damit waren aber die FB noch nicht aktualisiert.

Wir haben nun den Hinweis per SNOTE eingebaut und damit waren auch alle Erweiterungen aktuell.

entry.title: Solved: Automatic Payment: No payment method found
entry.content:
Solution:

I needed to export the transport request from the CUST System to Test System

 

I would like to make a payment run. However, the payment is not executed. The log shows me the following message:

-No bank account entered in table T042I for pmnt method T curr. EUR

- No permitted payment method exists

- ... payment not possible because of reported error

I have correctly maintained the payment method in the business partner. I have correctly maintained the payment method for the house bank according to the help. I have gone through the relevant scope items. I looked for help in the community and applied the procedures. Unfortunately I have no success. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

Vladimir

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA (10.00.280 FP2502) – Invalid Username or...
entry.content: I'm having the same problem. I'm using the same version: FP 2502. I followed Nidhi Singh's recommendations and the problem persists.

entry.title: Skipped Status for Application Jobs in IBP 2505 is not working after upgrade.
entry.content:
The new "skip an instance of a recurring application job" functionality delivered with IBP 2505 is not working. SKIP button is available in Job Application app but when a repetitive job is scheduled and use this function to skip one of the instances, the job status does not change, and the job is still executed as scheduled. 

any suggestions on how to use this new function implemented with IBP 2505?

entry.title: Re: HOW TO GET NOTIFICATION IN MY INBOX FIORI APP WHEN PA...
entry.content:
Got it! To ensure the invoice parking notification appears in the SAP Fiori My Inbox app , you'll need to integrate SAP Workflow with the Fiori My Inbox framework . Here’s how you can achieve that:

Steps to Display Notifications in My Inbox:
1. Verify the Workflow Task Configuration
- Use Transaction SWDD to check if a workflow task is triggered when an invoice is parked.
- Ensure the task is configured correctly with an appropriate recipient role .

2. Map the Workflow Task to Fiori My Inbox
- Open Transaction SWF_PUSH_NOTIF1 and check if your workflow task ID is mapped to push notifications.
- If it isn't, create a new mapping and associate it with My Inbox .

3. Activate the Required OData Services
- Ensure SAP Gateway services for My Inbox are active using Transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE .
- Activate the relevant service (`/IWPGW/TASKPROCESSING`) for workflow integration.

4. Ensure the Task is "User Decision" Compatible
- The workflow task needs to be compatible with User Decision processing to appear in My Inbox.
- Use Transaction SWDD to validate the task type and make modifications if necessary.

5. Configure Notifications in SSB2
- Go to Transaction SSB2 and confirm that My Inbox notifications are enabled .
- Assign the necessary catalog roles (`SAP_BR_AUDITOR` or custom roles) to ensure visibility.

6. Testing & Troubleshooting
- Trigger an invoice parking scenario manually.
- Verify that the notification appears in SBWP and also in My Inbox .
- If it still doesn't work, check Transaction SWF_PUSH_NOTIF1 for any missing configurations.

Alternative Approach: Custom Enhancement
If standard configuration doesn’t push notifications to My Inbox, you can implement an ABAP enhancement using BAdi WORKFLOW_TASKS_INBOX or extend the SAPUI5 My Inbox app to fetch workflow notifications explicitly.

entry.title: COE_SNAPSHOT_BAD_REQUEST - How to restrict the number of concurrent connections?
entry.content:
We are retrieving picklists from SuccessFactors and

we have some random failure with the error : 

COE_SNAPSHOT_BAD_REQUEST

We have temporarily blocked the snapshot pagination request

because too many consecutive requests have been attempted without accessing subsequent data. Please retry after you're unblocked and use $skiptoken to fetch the data of subsequent pages

we would like to know where is located the parameter in Datastore connector connected to SuccessFactors where is configured the number of concurrent connections allowed.

If we restrict these number to 4, we believe these issue could be solved.

Seems related to Profit Center 

  • Which authorization failure is reported by SU53?
  • Are the other transactions, those without authorization failures, also related to GL accounts (using LDB SDF with same nodes) ?

entry.title: Re: SMQ2 - Display LUW doesn't open the Display Logs
entry.content:
Hi @Atul_Mishr,

unfortunately we're still facing the same problematic and unable to find a solution. We will raise a ticket to SAP. It's quite weird. We compared our configurations (D, Q and P) and all is ok/the same. D and P are ok, but Q is not working at all.

KR Isa

entry.title: Allocate data from parent to child node
entry.content:
Hello, SAC community:

I have a dimension product with 2 hierarchies, one with multiple levels and the other one with the parents as root members. It looks like this:

 

In H1, 010105 has 0101 as parent, and 0101 has 01 as parent. In H2, only 01 appears as <root>. I'd like to introduce data at parent level using H2 and then be able to allocate it to its children equally or with weights depending in another year, for example. Is there any way to do this in a Data Action?

I've also thought about creating some dummy leaf members and showing these when the user inputs the data, but I don't know how to allocate the data if the data is in a leaf member. Doing a loop seems useless since it would need a parameter for each member that tells the number of siblings it has, and that just feels like bad desing.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: "Please Wait" Error in EPM Add-in
entry.content:
Hi,

We get an intermittent "Please Wait" message within Excel, having opened a template from a BPF instance.  The Excel freezes and the only way to resolve the issue to kill the session.  

We are using SAP BPC 2021, and EPM add-in SP38 Patch 17.  

Is anyone else experiencing this issue ?

Thanks

Justine

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" for BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2
entry.content:
Hello Karthik,

I tried with Update function module which also gives same errors but at different location.

I have added Update FM code below.

 

CALL FUNCTION 'ZFM_UPDATE_PO_CHANGE' IN UPDATE TASK
  EXPORTING
    PURCHASEORDER       = T_EKET-EBELN
 TABLES
*   RETURN              = RETURN[]
*   POITEM              = P_T_ITEM[]
*   POITEMX             = P_T_ITEMX[]
   POSCHEDULE          = T_POSCHEDULE
   POSCHEDULEX         = T_POSCHEDULEX .
*   AFS_POITEM          = P_T_POITEM[]
*   AFS_POITEMX         = P_T_POITEMX[] .

FUNCTION ZFM_UPDATE_PO_CHANGE.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Update Function Module:
*"
*"*"Local Interface:
*"  IMPORTING
*"     VALUE(PURCHASEORDER) LIKE  BAPIMEPOHEADER-PO_NUMBER
*"  TABLES
*"      RETURN STRUCTURE  BAPIRET2 OPTIONAL
*"      POITEM STRUCTURE  BAPIMEPOITEM OPTIONAL
*"      POITEMX STRUCTURE  BAPIMEPOITEMX OPTIONAL
*"      POSCHEDULE STRUCTURE  BAPIMEPOSCHEDULE OPTIONAL
*"      POSCHEDULEX STRUCTURE  BAPIMEPOSCHEDULX OPTIONAL
*"      AFS_POITEM STRUCTURE  /AFS/BAPIMEPOITEM OPTIONAL
*"      AFS_POITEMX STRUCTURE  /AFS/BAPIMEPOITEMX OPTIONAL
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------

DATA: LWA_ZBAPIRET2 TYPE ZBAPIRET2 .
CLEAR:LWA_ZBAPIRET2 .

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE'
    EXPORTING
      PURCHASEORDER = PURCHASEORDER "P_T_EKET_EBELN
    TABLES
      RETURN        = RETURN
      POITEM        = POITEM[]        "P_T_ITEM[]
      POITEMX       = POITEMX[]       "P_T_ITEMX[]
      POSCHEDULE    = POSCHEDULE[]    "P_T_POSCHED[]
      POSCHEDULEX   = POSCHEDULEX[]   "P_T_POSCHEDX[]
      AFS_POITEM    = AFS_POITEM[]    "P_T_POITEM[]
      AFS_POITEMX   = AFS_POITEMX[].  "P_T_POITEMX[].

LOOP AT RETURN WHERE TYPE EQ 'E' OR TYPE EQ 'A' OR TYPE EQ 'S'.
  LWA_ZBAPIRET2-TYPE           = RETURN-TYPE     .
  LWA_ZBAPIRET2-MESSAGE        = RETURN-MESSAGE     .
MODIFY ZBAPIRET2 FROM LWA_ZBAPIRET2.
CLEAR LWA_ZBAPIRET2  .
ENDLOOP.

ENDFUNCTION.

entry.title: Stock transfer from non SLED to SLED material
entry.content:
Hello everybody.

Can you please help me with this inquiry?

We have old materials without batch management and are now in the process of creating new materials by copy.

The new materials are configured with batch management. The "PR/PO/GR" works great, the batch is created. No problems there.

The warehouse user asked if it was possible to transfer the stock from the old materials to the new ones with batch management. I tried to transfer the stock via MIGO (mvt 309), and although I filled the field "DateofManufact. TrPg", the system deletes the date and returns the error "Enter the date of production".

Is it something i'm missing or SAP doesn't allow this transfer?

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE is not updating the Net Price in...
entry.content: Was the net price displayed correctly the next day?

entry.title: Re: the APIs for the Production Order component
entry.content:
Hi @omega-ou 

When I worked with Production Order in S/4HANA Cloud, I used the local API.

I added the co-product via i_productionordertp\_item.

And the Production Order Component via i_productionorderoperationtp\_operationcomponent.

Hope this helps you.

BR, Oleg

entry.title: Re: Control records for actual CCS missing for valuation...
entry.content:
hello,

check the period for MM in MMPV first, that the relevant posting period is open.

then in screen of SE38, run the report "FCML4H_CCS_STARTUP".

this will definitely fix the issue.

entry.title: Unable to Display Physically Deleted WBS Elements
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

Certain WBS elements were physically deleted (not just flagged for deletion), and we have noticed that the flagging option (logical deletion) was disabled at the time. As a result, these elements do not appear in the PRPS table.

We are now in a situation where we would like to reuse the same WBS codes that were used by the deleted elements. However, since they were physically deleted, we are unable to retrieve or confirm their previous existence 

Looking forward for your help.

Mohamed El Amine AOURAGH

entry.title: Re: Unable to edit Transport field in SOBJ
entry.content: You may need an SSCR key if you are working in the development system. You could also consider setting the 'Current Setting' flag so that no transport requests are required in the productive system after this one has been imported.

entry.title: Re: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content: Yes, that'll be the best thing to do 🙂

entry.title: Delivery should not be Invoiced
entry.content:
Hi,

I activate the scope item 5MQ.

1.In APP Manage outbound deliveries , I post the delivery . But I have not entered the Actual Date in the Delivery header.

2.In APP Create Billing Documents , I can see this delivery ,and click create billing documents . The system post Billing Document .

My quetion is :

As I have not entered the Actual Date in the Delivery header , the invoice should not be created .

how to limit it ?

entry.title: 📅 Day 6/30 – Routings in SAP PP: Mapping the Path to Production
entry.content:
Once your materials are in place and Work Centers are defined, it’s time to organize the production steps — and that’s where Routings come in!

In SAP PP, Routings describe the sequence of operations required to manufacture a product. It’s the production navigation map that tells SAP how and where to make things.

🔍What Does a Routing Contain?

Each routing includes:

🔸Operation steps (e.g., cut, drill, assemble)

🔸Assigned Work Centers

🔸Standard values (e.g., setup time, processing time)

🔸Control keys (influences whether confirmation, printing, or costing is required)

🔸Inspection characteristics (optional integration with QM)

🧩 How Are Routings Used in SAP PP?

✅Basis for Production Order creation

✅Drives Scheduling and Capacity Planning

✅Supports Cost Estimation

✅Enables Process Optimization

 

Real-Life Example:

If you’re manufacturing a steel chair:

1️⃣Cut steel sheets

2️⃣Bend into shape

3️⃣Weld joints

4️⃣Paint

5️⃣Final assembly

Each of these is an operation in the Routing, with time, tools, and resources assigned.

✅Pro Tip:

Use Reference Operation Sets and Routing Groups to reduce duplication and standardize processes across similar materials. This is key in repetitive or discrete manufacturing!

💬Have you built or optimized Routings before? What’s your experience with managing variant-specific Routings or frequent process changes?

entry.title: 按送达方实现销售定价业务
entry.content:
1. 创建条件表

2. 输入表编号，可以从其它表中复制。

3. 添加完成后，点【 】生成表。 

4. 确定条件表的存储顺序 

选择刚添加进来的条件 888,双击左侧的【字段】，进入字段设置。如下图可以设置优先级。

 

Step:

1.  设置物料价格，定义价格（如下图所示，可以选择有【送达方】这个条件了）

2. VA01 创建销售订单, 输入不同的送达方，系统会取不同的价格。

entry.title: Re: Monitor heartbeat of non-SAP systems/services

You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Streamlining Communication: Initiating a Whatsapp Chat Right from SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Introduction

Effective and Timely communications are the key to Success.With Instant and effective communications, great milestones can be achieved.By integrating Social Account Instant Messaging functionality directly within Employee Central, companies can streamline communication, boost productivity, and significantly enhance the employee experience.Enabling Small and important features like this is going to make a lot of change in the way SuccessFactors is used and also ensures Users and HR's make the most out of the System.

No more Copy Pasting URL's / Numbers from One Tab/Application to the Other.With Instant Messaging HRIS Element , Initiating Instant chats are just a Click Away!

Configurations :

Step 1 : Enable the iminfo HRIS Element from the Manage Business Configuration

Step 2 : Create a Picklist with the Social Account names you require and assign it to the field Domain

 

Step 3 : Create a onchange rule with Base Object as Social Accounts Information Model (Based on the Label , The Base Object Name may Vary) and assign it to the domain field

 

Step 4 : Now grant the necessary permissions under Manage Permission Roles to access the Social Accounts Information

Step 5 : Now go to the People Profile of the Employee and maintain the Details under Contact Information Social Accounts Information Block

Once you select the domain as Whatsapp , The Rule will be triggered and the URL will be set as https://wa.me (for whatsapp) and the number is to be maintained in the Username field without the + symbol and country code is mandatory. For example if the number belongs to India , it should be filled as 91123456789 where the 91 denotes the country code.

Step 6 : Click on the value maintained against the Whatsapp field and it will redirect to the whatsapp page where chat can be initiated as below.By Default , the link will be opened in the same page , you can right click and open the link in a new tab if you want it to be opened in a new page.

Click on continue to chat and you can use Whatsapp web if the Whatsapp Desktop Application is not installed.

This is not limited to Whatsapp and can be extended to other social media accounts like FaceBook and so on.

Conclusion :

The future of HR communication is here—and it’s fast, efficient, and user-friendly. By integrating Instant Messaging functionality directly into SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, you’re not only improving communication within your organization but also enhancing the overall employee experience.

Feel Free to drop your thought and comments

entry.title: Re: Which BAPI can be used to Tick the "Delivery Complete...
entry.content: Use BAPI_PROCORD_GET_DETAIL and BAPI_PRODORDCONF_GET_TT_PROP to get proposed data, then update subfields such as NO_MORE_GR and WITHDRAWN

entry.title: Re: Embed Docusign with Onboarding 2.0
entry.content: Hi - thanks for sending. I am not seeing where DocuSign is embedded within Onboarding 2.0. Can SAP please work on releasing this feature?

entry.title: Averaging in SAP Payroll using AVERA
entry.content:
Averaging in SAP Payroll

Introduction

SAP Payroll consultants are sometimes faced with a requirement where the rate of payment for a certain wage type needs to be an average rate of a sum of some other rates over a certain number of previous periods.

Real-life examples in Australia include:

  1. “Where, prior to the taking of leave, an employee was paid a uniform allowance other than at the weekly rate, the rate to be paid during absence on leave will be the average of the allowance paid during the 4 weeks immediately preceding the taking of leave.” From https://awards.fairwork.gov.au/MA000027.html
  2. “Part-time Employee – the Employee’s contracted hours, save that where the part-time Employee’s ordinary hours fluctuate because the Employee works additional ordinary shifts (but excluding a permanent variation) an average of the Employee’s ordinary hours over: A. the preceding 12 months; or B. the Employee’s period of service where the Employee has less than 12 months service; will apply where this is more favourable to the Employee” from https://vahpa.asn.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/AHP-Vic-Public-Sector-Single-Interest-Employers-EA-2021-26.pdf

Analysis

In the interest of fully implementing such complex legislative requirements, we are faced with the following options:

  1. Manually calculate the average outside the system and input it in payroll, thus simplifying the calculation
  2. Create a custom function/operation to calculate the average of a set of wage types, which gives more flexibility in ABAP but increases the complexity
  3. Leverage standard SAP functionality to average wage types and show the end user a full log of what’s happening under the hood

Option 3 is the cleanest way to do it but there are very few examples. Options 1 and 2 are mostly favoured and in the interest of time, projects go live before anyone investigates further. SAP Payroll has the standard AVERA function which does this heavy work very cleanly and you can read Technical Process of Average Processing (New) as a reference guide when implementing it.

Payroll -> Payroll: Australia -> Time and Payment/Deduction Wage Type Valuation -> Averages (New) has all the configuration nodes to enable this, although these tables are available in almost every SAP Payroll country’s configuration node.

 

Figure 0 SPRO Node for Averages (New)

Step-by-Step T51AV* Configuration

Let’s take an example of averaging step-by-step. Suppose the requirement is for payroll to calculate the average of overtime/penalty amounts and hours over the past 6 weeks.

1.     V_T51AV_2W Primary wage type to Average Bases

Assign the “to-be-averaged” or "seed" wage type to an "average base" /2XX wage type in V_T51AV_2W.

Figure 1 Seed Wage type to Average Base

V_T51AV_2P has options to prorate based on TASOLL, TKSOLL or TSSOLL but we won’t be needing that here.

The next is a critical sequence of 8 steps culminating in “Calculation Rules for Averages”.

Figure 2 SPRO Subactivities

2.     V_T51AV_R Relevance Rules

Create a custom relevance rule for your case in V_T51AV_R. All payroll periods are relevant. There are options to exclude relevance of some periods based on rehiring, partial overlaps, etc.

Figure 2.1 Relevance Rules

3.     V_T51AV_ROC Exclude Offcycle Reasons

If you want to exclude from averaging for example, a set of penalties paid as part of a one-off offcycle bonus payment, then this can be configured in V_T51AV_ROC.

Figure 3 Exclude Offcycle Reasons

 

4.     V_T51AV_C Adjustment Rules

To cater for scenarios where payscale increases can increase the value of the underlying “to-be-averaged” wage type, use V_T51AV_C.

 

5.     V_T51AV_B Cumulation Rules

Configure a new entry in V_T51AV_B cumulating the number and the amount fields and specifying a factoring specification F to ensure that penalties are prorated as per calendar days if only part of a payroll period is to be averaged.

Figure 4 Cumulation Rules

6.     PCR Q018 or a custom-copy of it

AVERA allows call of a custom PCR (copied from standard Aus PCR Q018) to finally divide the total by the number of average periods

 

Figure 5 Standard Calculation PCR

 

For this requirement, we create a custom PCR to store the number of average periods taken into account into a variable.

Figure 6 Custom Copy of PCR Q018

 

7.     V_T51AV_E Linkage of PCR

We link this custom PCR to a newly configured Final Processing Rule in V_T51AV_E.

 

Figure 7 Linkage of PCR

8.     V_T51AV_W Comparison Rules

If there is a requirement to compare this averaged value to another wage type within that period, then this can be configured within V_T51AV_W. This is useful in cases where the legislation requires the higher of two rates to be paid, or if the customer simply wants to intervene and provide a higher rate.

9.     V_T51AV_A Calculation Rule for Averages

We tie it all together in V_T51AV_A and provide 6 calendar weeks as the time period to average (3 fortnightly payroll periods).

Figure 8 Calculation Rule

 

The custom rule specified in V_T51AV_E always places the average in the rate field of a resultant /1XX wage type linked with the V_T51AV_A rule in table V_T51AV_P.

 

AVERA does not get activated if we attempt to place a custom wage type instead of a /1XX wage type, so this may be a standard limitation.

 

Hence, in this example, a /199 wage type needs to be created to hold the final average rate.

10.    V_T51AV_P Average Bases to Output Wage Type

 

As you can see below, the resultant wage type and the average rule have now been linked.

 

Figure 9 Average Base to Output WT

 

 

 

Payroll Testing

We are now ready to run payroll and look at the result.

 

Figure 10 Payroll Periods

Drilling down into AVERA function in the payroll log, we get the following picture.

 Figure 11 Averaging Time Slices

 

Remember, we specified in V_T51AV_A that we are using weeks as the time unit. To determine what is the last day of a week, we also incorporate a change in Feature LDAYW, that makes Wednesday the last day of a week, which is in line with the payroll period last date.

Figure 12 Feature LDAYW

 

 

Understanding the calculation

If you look at the underlying Infotype 2010 records that actually averaged out, you can see that they have the same number of hours. In reality, these wage types may originate from Infotype 2002 (Time evaluation in ECP / On-premise SAP Payroll) or from Infotype 14/15 or even be a basic pay allowance.

 

Our scenario here is an EC Payroll example which gets these entries into Infotype 2010 from EC Timesheet / SF Time Tracking / External Time system

 

Figure 13 Infotype 2010 Wage Type Records

 

Figure 14 How the constituent wage types look in Payroll

 

 

These Infotype 2010 wage types are cumulated to a notional wage type in a PCR as shown below. Our requirement here was to aggregate all penalty/overtime payments and average them to form a rate over 6 weeks.

Figure 15 Aggregating the Seed Wage Type

The idea is to preferably place this custom PCR in the payroll schema immediately after the individual wage types get calculated, otherwise they may get written to RT or thrown away later.

 

 

I have placed this custom collating PCR just before X023 does an RT storage.

Figure 15.1 Subschema XAL9 or QAL9

 

The initial seed wage type and the final output wage type, in this case, 9901 and /199 need to be notional, i.e. not adding to net pay and not taxable.

 

The final /1XX wage type also needs to be available in the IT, otherwise AVERA will not pick it up. Hence, I have just created it with a dummy value in the following PCR.

Figure 16 Output wage type with a dummy value

This also means that after I have the final average rate in /199, I need to copy it to another wage type and throw /199 away in another PCR towards the end of my schema.

 

Going back to the payroll log and function AVERA, Rule Z018 takes the average value and places it into the rate field of /199. I have also inserted some more logic to get the number of payroll periods traversed into a separate variable.

Figure 17 Custom PCR writing to Output WT

The final average rate sits pretty in my output wage type in the IT as shown below.

The amount is still that dummy value added before.

Figure 18 Output WT with Average Rate

 

Conclusion

It is possible to meet averaging requirements entirely with payroll functional configuration. This saves the efforts of ABAP developers and helps focus their attention to more complex custom developments.

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll 
HCM Payroll

entry.title: Changing Field Color Based on Value - SuccessFactors Employee Central Custom MDF
entry.content:
In this blog, I want to share a simple yet impactful customization aimed at improving the visibility of asset status at a glance.

As part of a broader initiative to manage all company assets efficiently, we implemented a custom MDF (Metadata Framework) solution. One key requirement was to track whether an asset is currently active with a user. For this purpose, we created a picklist field with the values Yes and No to indicate the asset's status.

While functional, I wanted to take it a step further and add real business value by making the interface more intuitive. That’s when I came up with the idea of visually highlighting the status values — green for Active (Yes), and red for Inactive (No). This simple visual cue allows users to understand the status of an asset instantly, without needing to read each value, thereby improving usability and efficiency.

Let’s dive into the configuration details!

Step 1 : Begin by creating three fields:

  1. Is Asset Active? – A picklist field with values Yes and No to capture the asset’s current status.

  2. Asset Status - Active – A string field that will display the text Active when the asset is in use.

  3. Asset Status - Inactive – A string field that will display the text Inactive when the asset is not in use.

The reason for creating two separate string fields for displaying the status is to apply distinct conditional formatting for each scenario. This allows us to color-code the statuses individually — for example, applying a green highlight for the Active field and a red highlight for the Inactive field — which wouldn't be possible using a single field because currently single field doesnot support Dynamic Styling.

Step 2 : Create a UI Rule in Manage Configuration UI , which will set the value of the others two fields as active and inactive.Please find the Screenshots below of the rule and also the Stylings set for this field

 

The Font color of the Field 1 (Asset Status - Active) is set to custom1 and custom1 color is set to green so values in the field will be green in color in the UI.

The Font color of the Field 2 (Asset Status - Inactive) is set to Alert and Alert color is set to Red so values in the field will be Red in color in the UI.

How to set Color of the Fields?

Theme Manager - > Fine Tune -> Portlets 

The Following rule will set the Asset Status fields to active or inactive based on the Other field (Active/Inactive) and also control the visibility of the fields while creating records.However , we have a limitation currently where the vibisility of the fields cannot be controlled in the Portlet as mentioned in the below mentioned KBA

2540412 - UI Rule to Set visibility for field based on a separate field selection

Also , I tried setting the condition value which doesnt work as expected , when condition values are set the style is not respected and shows the field value in body text color when introspected the fields donot appear in the Manage Configuration UI when condition values are set.The Same has been confirmed by SAP Engineering Team that Manage Configuration UI is in maintenance mode and currently no new additions are added , so we cant expect this to be resolved anytime soon!

Now , Lets see the magic in action!

 

 

Here , The Solution works perfect except for the visibility of another Asset Status field which cannot be hidden due to the current limitations by the SAP (hope they come up with an action plan for it soon).

Conclusion :

In a nutshell, this is a very creative configuration which will add real value to the Business.This may look simple but holds so much value where records can be identified with a Glance!

Feel Free to Drop your thoughts / Comments , I am open for any Suggestions

entry.title: Showing Onboarding Documents in Employee Central Profile
entry.content:
Before You Start

For reflecting onboarding documents in new hire employee profile after job start date, on the first step you must configure standard creating custom data collection object procedure as defined in SAP Help Portal. You can see steps below link.

Link: Configuring Onboarding Data Collection with Default Data Collection Object Instance

Note: Please do not forget association between custom onboarding document collection and Onboarding data collection user configuration as you know userConfig and cust_subjectUser configuration. It ensures the relations among uploaded documents and new hire profile. Otherwise this configuration does not work in your system.

Creating A Custom MDF for EC Profile

After standard onboarding data collection configuration, you can start to create a custom MDF for EC profile.

• Set externalCode as User. In detail, visibility must be editable.
• MDF API visibility must be editable.

• Add association under of new object. Choose onbaording data collection MDF and set Type Valid When.

• Set visibility Editable. 
• Write cust_subjectUser to Destination Object Column
• Write externalCode to Source Object Column

After this process, you can configure an UI in Manage Configuration UI page.

After UI configuration, you must create a new portlet in Configure People Profile and add new custom MDF object in this section.

Set Up Integration Between Two Objects

• Go to Integration Centre page and create a new integration as below.

• Chose option as below.

• Choose custom onboarding document collection object as source.
• In Configuration Fields page, switch field mapping view at the right corner.
• Add custom EC profile object as destination object.

• Drag and drop subjectUser of source entity to externalCode of destination entity.
• Drag and drop externalCode of source entity to externalCode inside of association of destination entity association.
• Add modify since filter and set last run time in Filter and Sort page.

Schedule and Save your new integration.

Now you can see onboarding documents in new employees profile after they started to work. According to permissions, employees can access this portlet and download onboarding documents.

Click documents icon and see onboarding documents.

If you see more details in documents sheet, you can restrict to access about custom onboarding object in permission role as below.

Or you can change labels of your custom onboarding document object, such as cust_subjectUser field label can be User.

entry.title: Visual Enhancements in 1H 2025: What’s New in Performance & Goals and Succession Planning
entry.content:
Continuous Performance Management

  1. In the previous version of Continuous Performance-> Meeting, users were able to click anywhere on an activity card to navigate to the activity details page.

 

 In the current version of Continuous Performance -> Meeting, users need to click on the hyperlink within an activity card for navigation.

2. In the previous version of Continuous Performance page, the Activities, Achievements, and Meeting views retained a user's last View by selection.

In the current version of Continuous Performance page, the Activities, Achievements, and Meeting views do not retain a user's last View by selection. By default, the Activities and Meeting views display content from the View by Status tab, and the Achievements view shows the ‘All Achievements’ content.

3. In the previous version of Continuous Performance page, when there were no channels can be deleted, the ‘Select And Delete Channels’ button was still available on the channel panel.

 In the current version of Continuous Performance page, when there are no channels can be deleted, the Select and Delete Channels button is hidden.

4. In the previous version of Continuous Performance page, users could delete all channels within a category by selecting the checkbox next to the category header in the Delete Channels panel.

In the current version of Continuous Performance page, the Select All checkbox has been relocated to the position below a category header.

 

 

Succession & Development

  1. In the previous version, selecting Nomination History for a position opened a dialog that wasn't titled "Nomination History".

 

 

In the current version, the dialog is titled "Nomination History" in a new row added at the top.

 

 

2. In the previous version, in the filters panel of the position tile view, the Search, + Add, and Clear Filters buttons might not be visible on the screen unless users scrolled down to the bottom of the panel.

 

 

In the current version, the buttons are fixed at the bottom of the screen, so they are always visible. 

 

Go through these updates in the system for better understanding. Thanks for reading.

entry.title: How to restrict access to products to customers?
entry.content:
Hello all,

there is a requirement to restrict access to products to customer when creating sales orders in webstore.
Most of the sales orders will come through frontend store and the idea is that customer from certain type of industry for example construction will be only able to order construction specific products while products from other product groups/categories will remain hidden for this customer and customer will not be able order from these categories.

Where do you recommend to make the restriction, in frontend store based on e.g. product hierarchy nodes or in S/4 Public cloud using specific functionality?

Thank you for sharing your ideas.
